description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable Docker image with the docker:stable-dind service and sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2. Define a single build stage and a job named build that runs only on the master branch. In the build job execute the following shell commands in order: docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, docker info, export IMAGE_TAG=\"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME/master/latest}\", docker pull registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/dast, docker tag registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/dast $IMAGE_TAG, and docker push $IMAGE_TAG. No caches or artifacts are defined.
